title: Cinematic Pumpkins
description: Cinematic Pumpkin Head brings widescreen letterboxing, dynamic lighting & shadows, and a subtle pumpkin-mask overlay to Minecraft Java 1.21+, turning every play session into a big-screen cinematic experience.
body:
# 🌟 Overview
Transform your Minecraft world into a scene!
Cinematic Pumpkin Head adds 21:9-style black letterboxing, and a subtle pumpkin-head overlay to give your builds that big-screen feel—shader-friendly and fully optimized for 1.21+.

# 🎥 Features
## Cinematic Letterboxing
Top and bottom black bars for that widescreen movie aspect ratio.

## Pumpkin-Head Overlay
A tasteful pumpkin-mask graphic in the corners of your screen, perfect for seasonal or horror builds.

## Shader-Compatible
Looks great with or without your favorite shaders—no conflicts.

## Optimized for 1.21+
Uses pack_format 34; guaranteed to load smoothly on modern Minecraft.

# ⚙️ Installation
Download the latest .zip from this page.

Move the .zip into your Minecraft resourcepacks/ folder.

In Minecraft, go to Options → Resource Packs and enable Cinematic Pumpkin Head.

(Optional) Tweak your FOV or apply a shader for extra drama!
